summary: Made two surgical seam edits to strengthen continuity from chapter 13's naming fallout into chapter 14 and from chapter 14's dispossession into chapter 15's yard-and-kitchen opening.
edits: Adjusted the opening sentence to echo the prior chapter's emphasis on the city's uptake of the new name.
Adjusted the closing paragraph to place Silas's salvaged chest in Junie's yard, bridging into the next chapter's opening position.
